# Gemini Spark Manual Build - field-hockey-coaching

This target does not have a built-in Gemini Apps publisher in `skill-tooling`.
Use the generated upload bundles in `uploads/` to create Gemini Spark skills manually in Gemini Apps or the Gemini Mac app.

Recommended flow:

1. Open Gemini Apps at gemini.google.com or open the Gemini Mac app.
2. Switch to Spark and open `Skills`.
3. Choose `Upload`.
4. Upload the matching `.zip` file from `uploads/`.
5. Review the imported skill and create it.
6. Repeat for each skill you want available in Gemini Spark.

Generated skills:

- `uploads/field-hockey-backfield-coach.zip`
- `uploads/field-hockey-coaching-staff.zip`
- `uploads/field-hockey-college-recruiting-coach.zip`
